purpose: Determine whether an AI can read, retrieve, verify, and cite Geode safely.

checks.detail: Local preservation-only material is identified and excluded until reviewed.
Only validated reviewer decisions may promote local evidence.

known_limits: Local source-preservation-only records remain available for audit but are not answer-safe.
Unknown currency must be disclosed until the source is verified against a current official version.
Coverage gaps are findings, not proof that no rule exists.
